LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS IN INTERVENTION RICHARD JONES & SANDRA JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 22, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS IN INTERVENTION RICHARD JONES AND SANDRA JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION IS GRANTED. THE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION FILED ON MARCH 4, 2013 IS STRICKEN AS IT PREDATES THE COURT'S ORDER ISSUED ON MAY 17, 2013, GRANTING INTERVENOR LEAVE TO FILE A COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION. THE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION FILED ON MAY 17, 2013 IS THE OPERATIVE PLEADING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS IN INTERVENTION RICHARD JONES and SANDRA JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION is Granted. The Complaint in Intervention filed on March 4, 2013 is stricken as it predates the Court's order issued on May 17, 2013, granting Intervenor leave to file a Complaint in Intervention. The Complaint in Intervention filed on May 17, 2013 is the operative pleading. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Jun-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs IN INTERVENTION RICHARD JONES & SANDRA JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION is continued to June 17, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposing papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
